b4_tvs._why: TVS diode — variant family, classified from description

c6_vref._why: voltage reference — IC path, AEC via qualifications

part.description: Adjustable precision shunt regulator with 2.5V reference voltage, 0.4% or 1.0% tolerance, 40V cathode voltage rating, low dynamic output resistance of 0.2Ω typical, and operating temperature range from -40°C to 150°C.
SMD type 940nm infrared emitter with GaAlAs LED, peak wavelength at 940nm, radiant intensity of 1.47 to 2.73 mW/sr at 20mA, viewing angle ±65 degrees, and RoHS compliant.

reclassified._why: parameter signals moved it E1 → B6 (Decision #175)

part.description: DC input 4-pin DMC-Isolator photo darlington optocoupler with 5000 VRMS isolation voltage, -55 to 110 °C operating temperature, and CTR ranging from 600% to 7500%, available in multiple lead form options.

Wi-Fi/BLE 2.4GHz IoT module with ARM Cortex-M33 MCU, 100MHz clock, 256KB SRAM, 2MB XIP Flash, supporting IEEE 802.11 b/g/n and Bluetooth 4.2, operating voltage 3.0V to 3.6V, industrial temperature range -20°C to +85°C.

antenna_type.value: One U.F.L connector for external antenna; PCB printed ANT (Reserve)

modulation_type.value: 11b: DBPSK, DQPSK, CCK for DSSS; 11g: BPSK, QPSK, 16QAM, 64QAM for OFDM; 11n: MCS0~7, OFDM

cased_unit_prefixes._why: REAL model whose supplier wrote capital-cased SI prefixes ("4010 PF"). Pins the whole-token unit rule: PF/UA/PA must convert, and look-alikes like Pin/Nm must not. The golden was blind to this class until Jul 2026 — a change affecting 2,086 corpus values produced an empty diff.

part.description: AK4080 N-Channel Enhancement Mode Power MOSFET with 40V drain-source voltage, 80A continuous drain current, RDS(ON) less than 6.5mΩ at VGS=10V, advanced trench technology for low on-resistance and high cell density, suitable for PWM and load switching applications.
